description_long: This cabin features a rectangular wooden structure with a prominent, double-layered gable roof covered in textured shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet sturdy appearance. Windows are symmetrically placed on the longer sides, each with a simple frame and divided panes, while the shorter sides have a single window or none. A covered porch with railings extends from one end, supported by posts and accessible via a small set of steps. The foundation appears slightly elevated, with a stone or concrete base visible beneath the wooden siding. The cabin sits on a grassy terrain with a stone path leading up to the porch, suggesting a welcoming residential setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a double-layered gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a covered porch on a raised foundation.
description_view_0: Side view showing two windows on the wooden facade and a partial view of the porch on the left.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the covered porch with railings and steps, and the double-layered gable roof above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two windows and a clear view of the wooden siding and stone foundation.
description_view_3: Rear view with a single window centered on the wooden wall and no visible porch.
attribute_roof_type: double-layered gable roof with moderate overhangs and shingle cladding
attribute_window_arrangement: Four rectangular windows symmetrically placed on the longer sides, each with divided panes; one single window centered on the rear short side; no windows visible on the porch end.
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the porch side, offset to the left when facing the porch, adjacent to the steps.
